cases.description: A single file with more than three potential smells where only the top three should be returned.

expected_negatives.label: PoorNaming
expected_negatives.reason: The file includes a lower-priority naming smell, but the ranked result must still cap at three candidates.

cases.description: A long but linear function that should be excluded from LongMethod.

expected_negatives.label: LongMethod
expected_negatives.reason: Linear data-shaping pipeline with no meaningful branching or mixed responsibilities.

cases.description: Repeated low-value lines that should not trigger DuplicatedCode.

expected_negatives.label: DuplicatedCode
expected_negatives.reason: Repetition is limited to logging and simple return wrappers.

cases.description: Short names that are valid by convention and should not trigger PoorNaming.

expected_negatives.label: PoorNaming
expected_negatives.reason: Identifiers are conventional loop and callback names used in clear local contexts.
